<!-- READ ONLY — DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE DIRECTLY -->
<!-- These are master templates. Edit /docs/ for your human narrative. -->
<!-- Run `scripts/sync-context.sh` to sync to .claude/context/ -->

# Templates

This folder contains **read-only, industry-standard templates** for every
document type the project needs.

## How It Works

```
/templates/   ←  READ ONLY master blueprints (this folder)
     │
     ▼
/docs/        ←  Human narrative (you write this, rich prose, for people)
     │
     ▼  scripts/sync-context.sh
     ▼
/.claude/context/  ←  Machine-optimized context (auto-generated, for AI)
```

## Template Index

| Template File             | Standard Followed              | .claude/context/ Target     |
|---------------------------|--------------------------------|-----------------------------|
| prd.md                    | IEEE 830 / Shape Up            | context/prd.md              |
| architecture.md           | C4 Model                       | context/architecture.md     |
| api-documentation.md      | OpenAPI spirit / JSON-RPC 2.0  | context/api-contracts.md    |
| api-rate-limit-policy.md  | IETF RFC 6585 spirit           | context/api-rate-limits.md  |
| db-schema.md              | ERD + Data Dictionary          | context/db-schema.md        |
| adr.md                    | Nygard ADR                     | context/adr.md              |
| security-model.md         | STRIDE threat model            | context/security-model.md   |
| data-flow.md              | DFD Level 0 + 1                | context/data-flow.md        |
| runbook.md                | Google SRE Runbook             | context/runbook.md          |
| test-plan.md              | IEEE 829                       | context/test-plan.md        |
| onboarding.md             | Internal dev onboarding        | context/onboarding.md       |
| changelog.md              | Keep a Changelog               | context/changelog.md        |
| incident-report.md        | Post-mortem / 5-Whys           | context/incident-report.md  |

## Rules
1. NEVER edit files in `/templates/` directly
2. Write your content in `/docs/` (human narrative)
3. Run `make sync-context` to regenerate `.claude/context/`
4. Use `--force` flag to overwrite existing context files
